creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Jul  3 12:31:47 2013
New Revision: 322223
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322223

Log:
  net-mgmt/phpipam: update to 0.8
  
  - Udpate to 0.8 [1]
  - Trim Makefile header and COMMENT
  - Mute cat pkg-message
  - Add WWW to pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/180204
  Submitted by:	Jake Smith <jake@xz.cx> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 11:53:12 2013	(r322222)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile	Wed Jul  3 12:31:47 2013	(r322223)
@@ -1,19 +1,15 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for: 	phpipam
-# Date created:				10 June 2012
-# Whom:					Jake Smith <jake@xz.cx>
-#
+# Created by: Jake Smith <jake@xz.cx>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	phpipam
-PORTVERSION=	0.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.8
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar
 
 MAINTAINER=	jake@xz.cx
-COMMENT=	PHPIPAM: PHP IP Address Management IPv4/IPv6
+COMMENT=	PHP IP Address Management IPv4/IPv6
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
@@ -58,6 +54,6 @@ do-install:
 	done
 
 post-install:
-	${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo	Wed Jul  3 11:53:12 2013	(r322222)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo	Wed Jul  3 12:31:47 2013	(r322223)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (phpipam-0.7.tar) = c03d00f0f1f8bcd2bb96329c666dd0137029eb8d3245445f4bdd2732dc936b18
-SIZE (phpipam-0.7.tar) = 2245120
+SHA256 (phpipam-0.8.tar) = 5038afefef5b376cf4ed382bb45b15ba48fa58cb0bd9813c4a57866f58bf8f88
+SIZE (phpipam-0.8.tar) = 3996672

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr	Wed Jul  3 11:53:12 2013	(r322222)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr	Wed Jul  3 12:31:47 2013	(r322223)
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-phpipam is an open-source web IP address management application. 
-Its goal is to provide light and simple IP address management 
-application. It is ajax-based using jQuery libraries, it uses php 
-scripts and javascript and some HTML5/CSS3 features, so some modern 
-browser is preferred to be able to display javascript quickly and 
+phpipam is an open-source web IP address management application.
+Its goal is to provide light and simple IP address management
+application. It is ajax-based using jQuery libraries, it uses php
+scripts and javascript and some HTML5/CSS3 features, so some modern
+browser is preferred to be able to display javascript quickly and
 correctly...
 
 Features and tools:
@@ -19,3 +19,5 @@ Features and tools:
 - Search IP database
 - IP request module
 - Custom IP address fields
+
+WWW: http://phpipam.net/
